texto: When there is a challenge to be met, you can be sure someone will rise to it. When there is a job to be done, someone will do it and get the deserved praise for it. Will that person be you?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Unknown author (possibly Lewis Carrol). que provoca temas ligados a trabalho. Ao questionar “When there is a challenge to be met, you can be sure someone will rise to it. When there is a job…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre trabalho, challenge, job, com foco em job.
